description: Fetches content from the web and optionally converts HTML to Markdown.

url.description: The URL to fetch. Supports http and https schemes.

format.description: Output format for fetched content. Use 'markdown' to convert HTML to Markdown, or 'raw' to return response body as-is. If not provided, defaults to 'markdown' for HTML content or 'raw' for other textual content types.

timeout.description: Request timeout in seconds. If not specified, defaults to 60 seconds.
